name: nokaze
description: Guardrails and skills from nokaze's real AI-operations practice — checks that turn repeated AI workflow failures into something your next session can use.

plugins.name: ai-operator-guard
plugins.description: Turns repeated AI workflow failures into checks your next session can actually use. 8 skills: mode declaration, completion receipt, handoff, auto-ack rule, drift check, overclaim reminder, start sweep, stop finalization.
